prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone selfie photo inside a brightly lit Japanese supermarket during a vacation snack run. Show exactly four young adult women posing closely around two shopping baskets and a cart, with natural casual styling and candid travel energy. The woman nearest the camera is at the lower left, cropped like she is holding the phone for a wide-angle selfie, wearing a cream ribbed tank top, a thin necklace, shoulder bag strap, and sunglasses hanging from her neckline. The second woman stands center-left in a white open shirt over a black top, holding a black shopping basket filled with packaged groceries. The third woman stands in the back center wearing a beige baseball cap, black sleeveless top, and dark pants, flashing a peace sign above her head while holding up a packaged food item. The fourth woman stands on the right in a white T-shirt and striped gray skirt, holding a pink packaged food box toward the camera. Include exactly two visible shopping containers: one black hand basket with packaged food inside and one gray supermarket cart basket containing a beige tote bag with bold “A.P.C.” text, a bottled drink, and small packaged produce. Background: refrigerated deli shelves packed with colorful products, price tags, and Japanese hanging signs, including blue 「沖縄そば」 on the left and dark 「もずく」 on the right. Use warm indoor fluorescent lighting, slight wide-angle phone distortion, casual handheld composition, realistic textures, and a busy but cheerful shopping atmosphere. Faces should be anonymized with smooth brown rectangular blur blocks covering all four faces, preserving the rest of the photo realism. Customize the scene as Japanese supermarket, the group size as four, the visible sign text as 沖縄そば and もずく, the tote bag logo as A.P.C., and the mood as excited vacation grocery run.
